title: Gold of the Seven Saints
writer: Leigh Brackett, Leonard Freeman, Steve Frazee
actors: Clint Walker, Roger Moore, Letícia Román
plot: In Seven Saints, Utah, McCracken's outlaw gang is vying for fur trappers Jim Rainbolt and Shaun Garrett's gold nugget fortune that also catches the eye of Mexican bandit Gondora and his caballeros.
